# database-operations-mcp

This project includes automated llms.txt generation for AI accessibility.

## Api
- [Base](src\database_operations_mcp\models\base.py): Models definitions and implementations
- [Connection](src\database_operations_mcp\models\connection.py): Models definitions and implementations
- [  Init  ](src\database_operations_mcp\models\__init__.py): Models definitions and implementations

## Configuration
- [Pyproject](pyproject.toml): Python project configuration and dependencies
- [Package](web_sota\package.json): Node.js project configuration and dependencies
- [Cargo](Cargo.toml): Rust project configuration and dependencies
- [Config](.git\config): Application configuration files
